description_long: This is a medium-sized paper grocery bag with a rectangular base and vertical sides, featuring two white loop handles attached at the top for easy carrying. The front and back panels are decorated with a vibrant, wavy, multicolored design in shades of orange, red, pink, yellow, and green, along with the brand name 'Renova' printed in bold black letters near the top. The side panels are plain brown, matching the main paper material of the bag. The bag appears empty, as the sides are not bulging and the top opening is unobstructed. The handles are made of twisted paper or thin rope, providing a sturdy grip. The overall construction suggests it is designed for carrying groceries or other lightweight personal items in urban environments.
description: A medium-sized, brown paper grocery bag with white loop handles and a colorful, wavy design on the front and back, branded with 'Renova'. The bag is empty and has a rectangular shape with plain brown sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Renova' logo, colorful wavy design, and both white loop handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain brown panel and the top opening with visible handles.
description_view_2: Back view, identical to the front, with the same colorful design and handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain brown panel and the open top with handles.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Yes, 'Renova' logo and colorful wavy design on front and back panels.
